entry.text: The garden path ends at a closed gate. Beyond it, the world.

look.say: The gate stands open. Your path begins.
A sturdy wooden gate. With the master's blade at your side, you may pass.
A closed garden gate. A samurai does not leave without their blade.

take.say: The gate is fixed to the path.

use.win: You step through the gate. Mist, road, and sky. The path of the blade is yours.

use.say: The gate will not open. You need the master's blade — from the shrine.

use.win: You rest the blade at your side and open the gate. Mist, road, and sky. The path of the blade is yours.

katana.win: You rest the blade at your side and open the gate. Mist, road, and sky. The path of the blade is yours.

letter.say: The letter already led you true. The gate wants the blade.

blossom.say: The blossom belonged at the shrine, not here.

objectives.text: Goal: return with the master's blade
